events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: timing marks misaligned by a tooth. This is a timing & mechanical task in automotive powertrain. Timing marks misaligned by a tooth is out of tolerance - timing must be exactly aligned. This is a fail, high/critical risk because misaligned timing can cause engine damage (interference engine could have piston-to-valve contact).

Let me construct the JSON.
